code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut done = false
while not done
  mut skipping = true
  while skipping
    if i >= n
      skipping = false
    else
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(c)
        if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
          i = i + 1
        else
          skipping = false
        end
      when None
        skipping = false
      end
    end
  end
  if i >= n
    done = true
  else
    mut sign = 1
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if c == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    mut val = 0
    mut reading = true
    while reading
      if i >= n
        reading = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(c)
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            reading = false
          end
        when None
          reading = false
        end
      end
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, val * sign)
  end
end

let a = match list.get(nums, 0)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
let b = match list.get(nums, 1)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
let s = match list.get(nums, 2)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    1
  end

mut out = ""
mut v = a
mut first = true
while v < b
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  v = v + s
end
println(out)
